# Sensor Log - STL Algorithm & Ranges

This project is intended to explore usage of STL Algorithms and C++20's Ranges.

It is a Sensor Log application. It first generates sensor DataPoints. Then the DataLog will be populated with data.

Successfully tested and running using Clang & GCC on win 11

```bash
# Example output
C:\...\cpp-sensor-log-algo-ranges\build-clang>"C:/project-coding/cpp/projects/cpp-sensor-log-algo-ranges/build-clang/sensor_log_algo_ranges.exe"
```
